Premium journeys • fast-loading Astro site

Travel pages that look expensive and convert smoothly.

Voyagrid is a travel landing page starter designed for trust, clarity, and mobile-first browsing. It gives you a polished homepage, reusable guide templates, clean CTA sections, and a responsive popup hamburger menu for smaller screens.

to add a new guide page

meta tags, sitemap, semantic structure
Handpicked route

7-day alpine wellness escape

Crafted for travelers who want comfort, strong visual storytelling, and a landing page that feels editorial.

Boutique Stays
Local Experts
Flexible Routes
Wellness Travel
Remote Escapes
Why this UI works

Built for premium perception, not clutter.

The structure uses clear scanning patterns, strong imagery, layered cards, and focused calls to action. It feels modern without becoming hard to edit.

Editorial hero section

Large headline, strong contrast, fast trust signals, and a visual block that sells the feeling of the trip immediately.

Responsive popup menu

On mobile, the hamburger opens a clean overlay panel that feels premium and remains easy to tap with one hand.

Simple content workflow

Add more destination pages by duplicating a markdown file inside src/content/guides. No messy page builder needed.

Content strategy

A landing page that can grow into a real travel brand.

This setup is not just a single static page. It is structured so you can expand into destination hubs, blog-style guides, seasonal offers, and search-friendly pages later.

Reusable layouts: shared header, footer, and SEO metadata keep the whole site consistent.
Guide templates: each new trip can become its own content page with title, image, excerpt, and metadata.
SEO-ready base: semantic headings, canonical tags, Open Graph tags, and sitemap integration are already included.
Starter content

Featured travel guides

These sample entries come from the content collection, so you can scale the site by adding more markdown files.

Nature Retreat

Quiet Lakes Escape

A refined slow-travel guide for travelers who prefer calm water, boutique stays, and scenic walking routes.

Lake District • 4 days
Luxury Culture

Desert Design Week

A high-end city and desert pairing for travelers who want architecture, gastronomy, and golden-hour visuals.

Marrakech • 5 days
Remote Escape

Coastal Workation Loop

A travel guide for remote professionals who want fast Wi-Fi, relaxing beaches, and a strong lifestyle atmosphere.

Portugal Coast • 7 days
Launch-ready template

Use this as your main landing page or the base for a full travel site.

Swap the brand, change the destinations, update the contact CTA, and keep adding guides without touching the main layout.

Open sample guide
Ready for your next escape?

Build trust fast and convert on mobile.

This starter was designed to feel premium from the first screen, while keeping the content structure simple for future updates.
